title: Generate R program for 14-3.01 Primary Endpoint Analysis

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using rtables or Tplyr to generate 14-3.01: Primary Endpoint Analysis. The program must: (1) Read ADADAS dataset, (2) Filter to Efficacy population, (3) Implement analysis: ANCOVA model with treatment, site group, and baseline covariate; LOCF imputation; Type III SS; dose-response trend test; pairwise comparisons with LS means and 95% CI, (4) Format table with treatment group columns (Placebo, Xanomeline Low, Xanomeline High), (5) Output as RTF document matching mock shell layout.
